Notes: * 59th meeting. Stockton leads the all-time series, 46-13, and has won
25 of the last 26 meetings since November, 1998.
* 3-pointer from right corner with 47.5 seconds left in 1st Quarter by Deseree
Johnson breaks all-time NJCU career record with 107 three-pointers.

Game.Officials: Robert Csigi,  Brian Gogerty,  Kristen Piscadlo
